description: Ethnic thong-style sandals from catwalk fashioned for the ethnic diva. These sandals can be worn with ethnic ensembles or with casual outfits.UpperThong style straps with heavy stone, wooden and plastic bead embellishmentsSynthetic toe separator for a snug FitPadded footbed with branding and print for comfortFootbed stitched to the outsole for durabilityOutsoleTPU outsole with branded groovesSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
